title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Byju's

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Byju's
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
